title: AbsorbAll Blue Centrefeed Paper Rolls, 2-Ply Quilted & Embossed – Super Absorbent & Extra Strong, 6-Roll Pack for Kitchen, Garage, Restaurant & Commercial Cleaning
features: Super Absorbent & Extra Strong – 2-ply 17.5 GSM paper ensures superior liquid absorption and tear resistance.
Premium Pure Virgin Pulp – Soft, durable, and hygienic for both professional and household use.
Generous Size – 195 sheets per roll provide long-lasting performance.
Versatile Cleaning – Perfect for kitchens, workshops, catering services, mechanics, window cleaning, offices, and everyday spills.
Economical 6-Roll Pack – One pack per case; great value for high-traffic environments.
Quilted & Embossed Texture – Enhances absorbency and strength while preventing lint residue.
Trusted Quality – CHSA accredited and FSC certified.
description: Tackle tough cleaning tasks with Diamond AbsorbAll Blue Centrefeed Rolls, designed for heavy-duty use in homes, workshops, and commercial settings. Each roll is made from pure virgin pulp paper and crafted with a 2-ply quilted, embossed texture for maximum strength and absorbency. Ideal for wiping tools, cleaning glass, soaking up spills, or general surface cleaning, these rolls keep your space hygienic and ready for anything. With 195 sheets per roll and a convenient 6-roll pack, you’ll always have a reliable supply for fast, efficient clean-ups.
